title: SEC Chief Pays Condolence Visit to Edwin Clark’s Family - FinancialEDGE
description: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, paid a condolence visit to the family of the late Edwin Clark, a renowned Pan Niger Delta Forum leader, in Abuja on Tuesday, February 18, 2025. During the visit, Dr. Agama met with Hon. Chief Ebikeme Clark, son of the late Edwin
html: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, paid a condolence visit to the family of the late Edwin Clark, a renowned Pan Niger Delta Forum leader, in Abuja on Tuesday, February 18, 2025. During the visit, Dr. Agama met with Hon. Chief Ebikeme Clark, son of the late Edwin Clark .
